title: Integrate C routing and timer repairs

acceptance_criteria: UINT32 wrap vectors pass; pending packets survive until forwarding; DTN release is explicit; GPSR passes UBSan; focused routing/RPL tests and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Transplanted routing/timer changes from 8e02a7ae9; resolved DTN/gradient/LOADng/RPL/ICMPv6 with current code, LICHEN_ naming, statics, no recursion; native_sim builds pass for loadng/trickle/routing tests
